excerpt: OrderFlow Labs is $49/mo for futures traders. See all plans, hidden fees, and how it compares to Bookmap & Jigsaw. Multi-platform, prop firm ready.
content:
Table of Contents

  • OrderFlow Labs Overview
  • OrderFlow Labs Pricing Plans
  • Hidden Fees & Additional Costs
  • Quick Comparison Table
  • Who Should Use OrderFlow Labs?
  • Alternatives to OrderFlow Labs
  • TradingToolsHub Recommendation

OrderFlow Labs Overview

OrderFlow Labs (official source) is an order flow analysis tool designed for futures traders, especially those working with prop firms or funded accounts. It supports multiple trading platforms, including NinjaTrader, Sierra Chart, MotiveWave, and EdgeProX. According to our OrderFlow Labs review, it stands out for its multi-platform compatibility and professional-grade features at a lower price point than some competitors.

OrderFlow Labs Pricing Plans

As of April 2026, OrderFlow Labs offers a single, straightforward pricing plan:

  • Monthly Subscription: $49 per month

This plan includes access to all supported platforms and is optimized for prop firm and funded account workflows. There are no published annual plans or lifetime licenses. If you need the most current details or have special requirements, check the official OrderFlow Labs pricing page.

Hidden Fees & Additional Costs

Based on available data, there are no disclosed hidden fees or extra charges with OrderFlow Labs. The $49/month covers the core software. However, users should be aware:

  • Platform Licenses: You may need a separate license for your trading platform (e.g., NinjaTrader, Sierra Chart), which is not included in the OrderFlow Labs subscription.
  • Futures Data: Market data fees from your broker or data provider are not included.

OrderFlow Labs does not support crypto or stock markets—futures only. For any unlisted fees or the latest terms, refer directly to the official source.

Quick Comparison Table

Tool Rating Price (Monthly) Supported Markets Platforms Best For
OrderFlow Labs 3.7/5 $49 Futures only NinjaTrader, Sierra Chart, MotiveWave, EdgeProX Prop firm traders, multi-platform users
Bookmap Not verified Not verified Not verified Not verified Professional order flow traders
Jigsaw Not verified Not verified Not verified Not verified Professional order flow traders

For a detailed side-by-side, see our OrderFlow Labs vs Bookmap comparison.

Who Should Use OrderFlow Labs?

OrderFlow Labs is best suited for:

  • Futures traders using multiple platforms
  • Prop firm traders and those managing funded accounts
  • Scalpers seeking professional-grade order flow tools without the premium price of Bookmap or Jigsaw

It is not suitable for crypto or stock traders, as it supports futures markets only.

Alternatives to OrderFlow Labs

If you need broader market support or a more established track record, consider:

  • Bookmap – Known for advanced visualization (pricing and features not verified; see official source).
  • Jigsaw – Popular with professional traders (pricing and features not verified; see official source).
  • ATAS – Larger company, but pricing/features not verified; check their official site.

For more, visit our comparison page.

TradingToolsHub Recommendation

If you are a futures trader—especially working with prop firms or funded accounts—and need a multi-platform order flow tool at a competitive price, OrderFlow Labs offers strong value at $49/month. Its professional features and workflow optimizations make it a practical choice for serious traders who don't want to pay Bookmap or Jigsaw prices. However, if you require support for crypto, stocks, or want a tool from a larger, more established company, you may want to consider alternatives. For the most current pricing or to confirm any details not verified here, always refer to the official OrderFlow Labs website.
